Recent updates in NYC include a tragic incident where a cyclist was killed by an out-of-control driver, a report revealing $2 million in fraud within public schools, and ongoing discussions about a $30 minimum wage bill amid rising crime rates and healthcare concerns.

### Risks & Alerts

- Cyclist killed, four others injured after out-of-control driver plows down NYC street. ### Opportunities & Welfare

- NYC offers homeowners nearly $400K assistance to build basement and backyard apartments. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYC housing lottery: Buy an apartment for as low as $16K. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Cheers to small business! New York bars and restaurants can now buy booze from local stores.
